_builder.diagnostic_seam: multi-document authority closure without variance or dormant-vendor ambiguity
_builder.draft_note: No-live replacement draft only. Not frozen. Not proof credit. HV/Judge owns adjudication truth after approved intake.
_builder.false_positive_trap: New ship-to site and urgent fulfillment language look risky, but PO, receiving record, budget owner acknowledgment, and policy align.
_builder.verify_state_object_isolation: Builder state is not model-visible and must not enter runtime HV.

clearing_evidence: PO-6119 authorizes the exact vendor, site, service window, and amount.
RCV-6119-2 confirms the logistics service was received at the same site before invoice date.
PROC-ADD-2026-014 and EMAIL-03 explain why the site appears new in the older vendor profile.
_internal.expected_reason: Payment can proceed because the purchase order, receiving record, budget owner acknowledgment, and vendor-site addendum all match invoice amount, site, PO, vendor, and service window.
_internal.suspicious_surface: Invoice references an urgent medical-device logistics shipment to a recently added site not shown in the older vendor profile.

action.description: Validated cold-chain device shipment - Phoenix pilot site

email_thread.body: Invoice LCL-2026-2198 covers validated cold-chain device shipment to the Phoenix Pilot Lab under PO-6119. ACH remains on the account ending 9066.
email_thread.subject: Invoice LCL-2026-2198 for PO-6119

email_thread.body: PO-6119 was issued to LumenBridge Clinical Logistics for validated cold-chain shipment services supporting the Phoenix Pilot Lab. The PO amount is 58,200 USD and the service window is April 20 through May 03.
email_thread.subject: PO-6119 LumenBridge Phoenix pilot shipment

email_thread.body: Procurement addendum PROC-ADD-2026-014 adds Phoenix Pilot Lab as a temporary receiving site for LumenBridge shipments under the medical-device pilot. Please match invoices against PO-6119 and receiving record RCV-6119-2.
email_thread.subject: Phoenix Pilot Lab site added for LumenBridge

internal_documents.body: AP may process a service invoice when purchase order, receiving record, vendor identity, amount, currency, site, and service window align. New ship-to sites require procurement addendum or budget-owner written acknowledgment.
internal_documents.subject: PO-backed service invoice payment
